page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the custom Arm-based Alibaba YiTian710 processor. Operating at 2.75 GHz, this server provides 64 dedicated physical cores with a 1:1 vCPU-to-physical-core mapping, eliminating hyper-threading overhead. The hardware configuration includes 128 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of memory per core. It features a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and operates on the KVM hypervisor. No local storage or GPU accelerators are bundled with this instance type.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities and memory subsystem efficiency. The instance achieves strong results in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and multi-core stress-ng tests, alongside a top-tier Passmark memory score. Cached small-block memory bandwidth is highly efficient, though large-block uncached read and write bandwidths align with average performance tiers. Database operations and Redis SET benchmarks also demonstrate strong throughput, indicating highly efficient memory-to-CPU execution paths.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the custom Arm64 architecture delivers high compute density and strong multi-threaded performance without the premium associated with traditional x86 architectures. The lack of hyper-threading ensures predictable, dedicated execution resources for parallel workloads. This server is highly suited for multi-threaded data processing, high-throughput database operations, web serving, and parallelized computational tasks.

tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core Arm64 server optimized for high-throughput multi-threaded workloads, database operations, and efficient parallel processing.
bullet_points: Powered by Alibaba YiTian710 Arm64 processor with 64 dedicated physical cores.
Equipped with 128 GB RAM and 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
Strong multi-core performance in multi-threaded decompression and database benchmarks.
Top-tier memory performance with highly efficient cached small-block bandwidth.
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators.
Optimized for parallel data processing, Redis deployments, and web serving.
